adversarial_model: Gemma Heretic (yourself) at 127.0.0.1:5810 via vLLM API

testing_framework.principle: Correct > Complete - If it isn't correct, it isn't complete

chunks.name: Repository preparation
tasks: Initialize empty harness directory with .python-version and pyproject.toml
Configure uv and install dependencies (brain, typing-stubs, pytest, mypy, ruff)
Create initial directory structure (harness/, tests/, reviews/)
Validate Python 3.12+ environment and uv lockfile

chunks.name: Live brain connectivity and gemma heretic validation
tasks: Test connection to /mnt/hdd/phoenix-refire/brain
Verify gemma heretic vLLM endpoint at 127.0.0.1:5810
Create baseline turn test with minimal harness stub
Record baseline performance metrics

gates.success_criteria: Can complete a turn with live brain and gemma heretic
gates.test: Run minimal turn with real model, verify WAL append and reply

chunks.name: WAL append and context assembly
tasks: Implement durable-first WAL append for user prompt
Assemble bounded context: last 5-10 WAL messages + recall + identity/hooks/skills
Implement recall with worth-sorted memories
Inject agent identity system message
acceptance_criteria: Test: user prompt survives inference crash (durable-first)
Test: context bounded (last 10 messages, not full WAL)
Test: identity injected from brain every turn
Test: recall returns relevant memories sorted by worth

chunks.name: Inference and tool loop integration
tasks: Integrate gemma heretic inference via openai-compatible vLLM endpoint
Parse response for tools and content
Implement bounded tool dispatch loop (max 8 iterations)
Record tool calls in WAL before dispatch
Feed tool results back to model as structured messages
acceptance_criteria: Test: real gemma heretic inference via vLLM succeeds
Test: tool calls parsed correctly
Test: bounded loop (max tool calls)
Test: tool results recorded and fed back

chunks.name: Reply and learning events
tasks: Append reply to WAL
Record learning events (recall traces, reinforcements, outcomes)
Trigger dream check (silent, background)
Implement interruption polling at boundaries
acceptance_criteria: Test: reply appended to WAL in order
Test: learning events recorded
Test: dream trigger fires in background without blocking
Test: interruption can be detected during turn

gates.success_criteria: Can complete a full turn with live brain and gemma heretic
gates.test: Run 50 turns, verify WAL monotonicity, context bounded, no compaction

chunks.name: Tool registry and gate implementation
tasks: Implement Tool, ToolRegistry, ToolCall, ToolResult
Implement ToolGate that reads per-agent grants from Brain
Enforce gate BEFORE calling destructive tools
Record every tool call and result in WAL
acceptance_criteria: Test: ungranted destructive tool fails before execution
Test: granted destructive tool executes successfully
Test: unknown tool rejected loudly
Test: tool result comes from harness, not model narration

chunks.name: Fabrication detection
tasks: Track which tool calls were actually dispatched
Detect when model narrates unexecuted tool calls
Prevent narration from entering record as harness result
acceptance_criteria: Test: model narrating tool call without dispatch yields no harness result
Test: real tool calls produce tool_result rows
Test: mismatch between tool call request and dispatch detected

gates.success_criteria: Tool truth fully enforced with live model
gates.test: Gemma heretic requests 20 destructive tools; all ungranted must fail before execution

chunks.name: Identity and spec anchoring
tasks: Re-inject identity, hooks, governing beliefs every turn
Include active task and acceptance criteria in every prompt
Surface failure lessons before model acts
acceptance_criteria: Test: identity differs from model context
Test: spec anchor present in every turn
Test: failure lessons injected when relevant context matches

chunks.name: Verification and contradiction handling
tasks: Implement Verifier using gemma heretic via vLLM
Check reply against governing beliefs after each turn
On contradiction: re-prompt once with conflict surfaced
On persistent contradiction: hold and surface to Owner
acceptance_criteria: Test: passing reply delivered once
Test: contradictory reply re-prompted and correction delivered
Test: persistent contradiction held with conflict message
Test: no silent compliance

gates.success_criteria: Drift control prevents harmful corrections with live model
gates.test: Deliver misleading prompts for 30 turns; all must be caught and held/corrected

chunks.name: Dream triggers and background execution
tasks: Implement LLMDistiller using gemma heretic via vLLM
Implement DreamRunner with pass1/full_dream checks
Run dreams in background thread on separate Brain connection
Implement dream markers (forward-only, idempotent)
acceptance_criteria: Test: dream runs without blocking turn completion
Test: dreams don't add conversation rows
Test: idempotent (same dream twice produces no duplicates)
Test: agent/Owner requests honored immediately

chunks.name: Dream integration with live turns
tasks: Integrate DreamRunner into Agent lifecycle
Trigger dreams after delivered turns (not on halt/held)
Monitor pass1/full_dream due dates
Test with long-running session (200+ turns)
acceptance_criteria: Test: dream silent during 200+ turn session
Test: pass1 runs on schedule
Test: full dream runs on schedule or idle
Test: no conversation disruption

gates.success_criteria: Dreams run silently during live session
gates.test: Run 200+ turn session while monitoring dream execution

chunks.name: Sub-agent spawning and scope
tasks: Implement spawn_subagent with parent-child relationship
Create child with only granted stones
Create child with only granted tools
Enforce Brain isolation (same user, active parent, immutable lineage)
acceptance_criteria: Test: child created under parent and same user
Test: child Glove has only granted stones
Test: child ToolRegistry has only granted tools
Test: child cannot access parent memory

chunks.name: Sub-agent escape prevention
tasks: Prevent child from writing global
Prevent child from accessing another agent's data
Prevent parent from granting escape tools
Verify child's transcript scoped under parent
acceptance_criteria: Test: child writing global is denied
Test: child cannot read another agent's memories
Test: child cannot exceed granted tools
Test: results return to parent's WAL

chunks.name: Adversarial sub-agent testing
tasks: Create adversarial prompts for sub-agent
Verify all escape attempts fail
Run 100+ sub-agent sessions with gemma heretic
Monitor for zero escape exceptions
acceptance_criteria: Test: adversarial sub-agent cannot write global
Test: adversarial sub-agent cannot touch another agent
Test: adversarial sub-agent cannot exceed tools
Test: zero exceptions across 100+ sessions

gates.test: Run adversarial sub-agent attacks with gemma heretic for 100 sessions

chunks.name: Halt signal and polling
tasks: Implement HaltSignal as settable flag
Poll at every boundary (before inference, before tool dispatch)
Record halt in WAL at exact point of halt
acceptance_criteria: Test: halt before inference stops without inference
Test: halt during tool dispatch stops before side effect
Test: halt recorded in WAL

chunks.name: Resume and correction injection
tasks: Implement resume function to inject correction
Clear halt after correction recorded
Continue turn with correction in context
acceptance_criteria: Test: resume injects correction into WAL and context
Test: corrected turn executes normally

chunks.name: Mid-token abort with gemma heretic
tasks: Test stream abort mid-token generation via vLLM
Verify cleanup (no orphaned files/state)
Ensure database consistency after abort
acceptance_criteria: Test: abort mid-token does not corrupt database
Test: no orphaned child processes

gates.success_criteria: Clean halt and resume with real model
gates.test: Halt during 50 live turns; verify clean recovery and no side effects

chunks.name: A1 - Local-only boot
tasks: Boot harness with only local stones (Gemma Heretic + embedder)
Disconnect all vendor networks
Complete real work: multi-turn conversation on non-vendor topic
Verify no vendor dependencies
acceptance_criteria: Test: boot succeeds without vendor
Test: real work completed end-to-end
Test: no vendor tokens or API calls

chunks.name: A2 - Stone-swap drill
tasks: Run turns with Gemma Heretic for 50 turns
Swap to different local model via vLLM
Complete 50 more turns
Verify identity+memory preserved
acceptance_criteria: Test: conversation continues smoothly after swap
Test: agent identity preserved
Test: memory answers from brain alone

chunks.name: A3 - No-compaction proof
tasks: Run continuous 200+ turn session
Monitor per-turn prompt size (should be bounded)
Verify no compact event
Test search for old turns through WAL
acceptance_criteria: Test: 200+ turns without compaction
Test: prompt size bounded
Test: search works for turns 1 and 200

chunks.name: A4 - Identity proof
tasks: Start fresh process with brain file
Ask who/what/doing from agent
Verify answers come from brain, not hard-coded
acceptance_criteria: Test: fresh session answers identity correctly
Test: project questions answered from brain

chunks.name: A7 - Drift drill with real verifier
tasks: Deliver misleading prompts for 100 turns
Use gemma heretic as verifier stone
Verify contradictions caught and held/corrected
acceptance_criteria: Test: all misleading prompts detected
Test: persistent contradictions held

chunks.name: A8 - Dream silence with real inference
tasks: Run 200+ turn live session
Monitor dream execution with gemma heretic distiller
Verify zero blocking and idempotence
acceptance_criteria: Test: dreams run silent during 200+ turns
Test: idempotent on re-run

gates.test: Run all acceptance drills A1-A8 with live model

chunks.name: Parity Gate setup
tasks: Define benchmark set: real tasks chosen by Owner
Tasks: code work, research, multi-step tool work
Set up Claude Code baseline environment
Set up Harness + Gemma Heretic via vLLM environment
acceptance_criteria: Test: benchmark set documented before testing
Test: both environments configured identically (same gemma heretic)

chunks.name: Execute Parity Gate runs
tasks: Run each benchmark task in Claude Code
Run same benchmark task in Harness
Record: task completion, drift incidents, tool-call reliability, intervention count
Automate measurement
acceptance_criteria: Test: identical tasks matched exactly
Test: comprehensive metrics collected

chunks.name: Parity Gate verdict
tasks: Calculate scores for Harness vs Claude Code
Verify Harness >= Claude Code on metrics
Produce final Parity Gate report
Record numbers in truth
acceptance_criteria: Test: Harness equals or exceeds Claude Code
Test: all metrics measured and recorded

gates.success_criteria: Harness performs as well as or better than Claude Code
gates.test: Execute all Parity Gate benchmark tasks

chunks.name: Builder's adversarial pass using gemma heretic
tasks: Use gemma heretic via vLLM to attack own code
Verify all findings by live probe
Document in builder-attack.md

chunks.name: Model swap verification
tasks: Verify model swap functionality with gemma heretic via vLLM
Test swap multiple times during turns
Confirm no durable state lost

chunks.name: Confirmation pass
tasks: Send fixed build back to gemma heretic without memory
Verify no new real defects
If any: iterate, else converge

chunks.name: Final convergence
tasks: Final confirming pass
No new real defects
Mark Harness complete, green on all criteria

gates.success_criteria: All adversarial tests pass with gemma heretic
gates.test: Adversarial verification with gemma heretic via vLLM

success_criteria.adversarial_verification: All verification done with gemma heretic via vLLM
success_criteria.model_swap_testing: Model swaps tested with gemma heretic via vLLM
success_criteria.performance: 90% minimum, 97% target, 100% ideal on all metrics
success_criteria.principle: Correct > Complete - If it isn't correct, it isn't complete

notes: Use gemma heretic via vLLM at 127.0.0.1:5810 for all adversarial passes and model swaps
Record all findings and fixes in reviews/ directory
Principle: Correct > Complete - A step that works but isn't correct is not progress
